item.title: misty-step/aesthetic v2.9.0
item.description:
New Features

  • You can now enforce design system consistency using the included Playwright testing gate that validates component usage against Misty Step guidelines

Bug Fixes

  • Fixed release artifact formatting to ensure proper distribution of design tokens and documentation

item.title: misty-step/aesthetic v2.8.1
item.description:
New Features
  • You can now enforce design system compliance in your test suite using the included Playwright gate that validates adherence to design tokens and component usage patterns.

Bug Fixes

  • Fixed token documentation generation to ensure the latest design token reference is properly included in releases.
]]>

item.title: misty-step/aesthetic v2.8.0
item.description:
New Features
  • You can now reference all design tokens programmatically through the generated tokens.json file and browse them on the new token reference page
  • You can now access interactive state matrices for all catalog primitives, showing hover, focus, disabled, and validation states
  • You can now search the component catalog client-side for faster primitive discovery
  • You can now integrate with the machine composition feed to automatically adopt design system updates in your tooling

Improvements

  • The catalog source blocks now include copy-to-clipboard functionality for easier code integration
]]]]>]]>

item.title: misty-step/aesthetic v2.7.1
item.description:
Bug Fixes
  • Fixed missing token documentation that was out of sync with the latest design system updates.
]]]]]]>]]]]>]]>
